articles.title: AAP releases 6th List for Haryana Assembly Elections - News On AIR
articles.full_text: Aam Aadmi Party has announced its 6th list for the Haryana assembly elections today. The list consists of 19 candidates. The party has fielded Prem Garg from Panchkula seat, while Kamal Bisla will contest from Fatehabad seat. Ketan Sharma has been declared party candidate from Ambala City seat and Dhanraj Kundu from Dadri seat.
